title: Use real-time synthesis
subtitle: Combine ideas while speaking.
overview: Module: C1-Level Speaking Moves. C1 Bridge develops conceptual thinking, source synthesis, discourse control, long-form speaking, analytical writing, and independent C1 learning habits.

sections.title: C1 bridge focus
rows: Real-time synthesis is the ability to connect ideas as the conversation develops.
实时综合是随着对话发展连接想法的能力。
C1 Bridge frame: respond to complexity, maintain coherence, manage the listener, and develop your own line of thought.
C1 Bridge 框架：回应复杂性、保持连贯、管理听者，并发展自己的思路。
Synthesize another person’s point with your own.
把别人的观点和你自己的观点综合。
Combining what you said with my earlier point, I think the solution is not more practice in general, but better-designed practice that includes feedback and emotional safety.
把你说的和我之前的观点结合起来，我认为解决方案不是泛泛地更多练习，而是设计更好的练习，包括反馈和情绪安全。

items.en: Real-time synthesis is the ability to connect ideas as the conversation develops.
items.zh: 实时综合是随着对话发展连接想法的能力。

items.en: C1 Bridge frame: respond to complexity, maintain coherence, manage the listener, and develop your own line of thought.
items.zh: C1 Bridge 框架：回应复杂性、保持连贯、管理听者，并发展自己的思路。

items.en: Combining what you said with my earlier point, I think the solution is not more practice in general, but better-designed practice that includes feedback and emotional safety.
items.zh: 把你说的和我之前的观点结合起来，我认为解决方案不是泛泛地更多练习，而是设计更好的练习，包括反馈和情绪安全。

items.en: I will not hide behind advanced vocabulary; I will make the thinking clear.
items.zh: 我不会躲在高级词汇后面；我会把思考说清楚。

items.en: A C1 Bridge answer should show independence, coherence, nuance, and control.
items.zh: C1 Bridge 回答应该显示独立性、连贯性、细腻度和控制力。

items.en: If the idea is abstract, I will anchor it in one concrete case.
items.zh: 如果想法很抽象，我会把它锚定在一个具体案例中。

items.en: I can revise not only grammar, but also logic, density, tone, and voice.
items.zh: 我可以修改的不只是语法，也包括逻辑、密度、语气和声音。

items.en: This lesson becomes real when I can use the move in a new topic without copying the model.
items.zh: 当我能在新话题中使用这个动作，而不是复制示范时，这节课才变得真实。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Synthesize another person’s point with your own.
lines.zh: 把别人的观点和你自己的观点综合。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Combining what you said with my earlier point, I think the solution is not more practice in general, but better-designed practice that includes feedback and emotional safety.
lines.zh: 把你说的和我之前的观点结合起来，我认为解决方案不是泛泛地更多练习，而是设计更好的练习，包括反馈和情绪安全。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the response more conceptual and still easy to follow?
lines.zh: 你能让回应更概念化，同时仍然容易跟上吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will define the idea, give one concrete case, and explain why it matters.
lines.zh: 可以。我会定义这个想法，给一个具体案例，并解释它为什么重要。

items.en: Synthesize another person’s point with your own.
items.zh: 把别人的观点和你自己的观点综合。

items.en: Answer once in eight to ten sentences with a clear line of thought.
items.zh: 用八到十句话回答一次，并保持清楚思路。

items.en: Add one C1 Bridge move: define a concept, synthesize sources, name an assumption, or state an unresolved question.
items.zh: 加入一个 C1 Bridge 动作：定义概念、综合来源、指出假设，或提出未解决问题。

items.en: Record the answer, then revise one part for logic and one part for style.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后修改一处逻辑和一处风格。

items.en: Keep the revised answer as a model for future C1 Core practice.
items.zh: 把修改后的回答作为未来 C1 Core 练习的模型。
